name: link
description: Typed link to an external or internal resource. Extends standard markdown links with a semantic kind attribute for classification and indexing.

target.description: URI, file path, or resource identifier that the link points to.

kind.description: Semantic type of the linked resource. brand-asset = logo/trademark; reference = background reading; source = primary source material; exhibit = formal case exhibit.

scope_rules.description: Links are always inline — they annotate a specific reference point within running text.

example: See the original filing {% link target="exhibits/filing-2026-001.pdf" kind="exhibit" /%} for full details.
